title: Altered (discontinued)
description: Once you enter you must see it through.
body:
The altered mod adds a new dimension that looks like the overworld, but altered. Everything there looks and feels wrong. There are anomolies scattered about. Some things shouldn't be there, and yet they are. You can enter through depleted machines made by someone who dissapeared long ago. Making use of an unstable crystal that distorts reality around it, you can provide the portal generator with what it needs to open a gateway to another reality. Be warned, entering is much easier than exiting. Whoever made these portals didn't make any on the other side.

I decided to pick up the project today and mc creator got an update that broke this project. I don't know how to fix it, but I don't care. It was my first project. It may suck, but that's okay. I learned a bit and now I'm ready to try again. If anyone wants to try to improve off what I did here, go ahead. Do whatever you want with it. I don't care. I will be making something else soon.
No matter what happens, keep going, and follow the ruby beacon.
